full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Identifying key assumptions behind the ADMM-based sparse SVM method
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the main assumptions underlying the ADMM-based L1-regularized SVM method described in this paper?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Converted the response into structured assumption explanations following the assignment format.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped identify assumptions related to sparsity, optimization decomposition, and linear decision boundaries.
